description: Cronitor is a monitoring service for cron jobs, heartbeat checks, websites/APIs, real-user monitoring, incidents, and status pages. It lets teams configure monitors, ingest telemetry, and manage alerting and operational status from a hosted platform.
summary: Cronitor exposes two HTTP APIs (the main REST API at `cronitor.io/api` and the telemetry ingestion API at `cronitor.link`), plus a `cronitor` CLI and a built-in stdio MCP server shipped inside that CLI.
